_metadata.description: Migration Effort Estimation: Complexity to Manual Hours Mapping
_metadata.author: Suman Tripuraneni

X-Large.note: 1 Week: Heavy architectural refactoring (e.g., removing Privileged/HostNetwork dependencies)

Large.note: 2 Days: High-friction app troubleshooting and storage migration

Medium.note: 1 Day: Standard landing fixes and configuration tweaks

X-Large.note: 3 Days: Complex Egress IP, Firewall whitelisting, and massive Secret density

Large.note: 1 Day: Infrastructure/Plumbing setup and Network Policy coordination

Medium.note: 4 Hrs: Standard environment prep and Resource Quota matching

Small.note: 1 Hr: Basic namespace creation and RBAC setup
